solution.p: We will factor 25t^{2}-30tx+9x^{2} where a=25, b=-30, and c=9.

Perfect Square Formula: The formula for perfect square trinomials is (a \pm b)^2=a^2 \pm 2ab + b^2. Note that the polynomial 25t^{2}-30tx+9x^{2} matches the formula's right side, and we have: \begin{aligned}[t]25t^{2}-30tx+9x^{2}\amp =\left(5t\right)^2-2\left(5t\right)\left(3x\right)+\left(3x\right)^2\newline \amp =\left(5t-3x\right)\mathopen{}\left(5t-3x\right)\newline \amp =\left(5t-3x\right)^{2}\end{aligned}
AC Method: In this method, we first calculate the product of a and c in ax^2+bx+c. For this problem, we have (25) \cdot (9) = 225.

The number 225 can be factored into the product of two numbers in the following ways:  egin{array}{lll}1(225)\amp -1(-225)\amp 3(75)\amp -3(-75)
ewline5(45)\amp -5(-45)\amp 9(25)\amp -9(-25)
ewline15(15)\amp -15(-15)\amp \end{array} Looking at the corresponding sums, we want a sum of -30, and this sum happens with (-15)+(-15)=-30 So we write  egin{aligned}[t]25t^{2}-30tx+9x^{2}\amp =25t^{2}-15tx-15tx+9x^{2}
ewline \amp =5t\mathopen{}\left(5t-3xight)-3x\mathopen{}\left(5t-3xight)
ewline \amp =\left(5t-3xight)\mathopen{}\left(5t-3xight)
ewline \amp =\left(5t-3xight)^{2}\end{aligned}Generic Rectangles Method: First, we set up generic rectangles by putting the first term and third term in 25t^{2}-30tx+9x^{2} into the top left and bottom right rectangles:
The first term's coefficient, 25, can be factored into the product of two numbers (where the first factor is positive) in the following ways: \begin{array}{llll}1(25)\amp 5(5)\amp \end{array}
The third term's coefficient, 9, can be factored into the product of two numbers in the following ways: \begin{array}{llll}1(9)\amp -1(-9)\amp 3(3)\amp -3(-3)\newline\end{array}

We put each pair into the corresponding places next to those generic rectangles, and try to match the area of those rectangles with 25t^{2}-30tx+9x^{2} by guess-and-check. The following generic rectangles show the solution:

Dimensions of those generic rectangles in the diagram give us the solution: \begin{aligned}[t]25t^{2}-30tx+9x^{2}\amp =\left(5t-3x\right)\mathopen{}\left(5t-3x\right)\newline \amp =\left(5t-3x\right)^{2}\end{aligned}
